name: Oneida Family YMCA
description: Oneida Family YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Oneida, NY. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Players have access to restrooms and wheelchair accessibility. A membership is required to play.

name: Sullivan Park
description: Sullivan Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Chittenango, NY. There are 3 outdoor acrylic courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts are free.
